channel.title: Using shortcodes in Frontity
channel.description: Is there any additional configuration for shortcodes? My contact form is not showing up (added short code on Contact page)

item.title: Using shortcodes in Frontity
item.dc:creator: codemonkeynorth
item.description:
@mh123 see my comment here for a use-case (not for contact form but just in general)

Render CPT with SSR, but don't display page until data loaded with CSR 🙋Get Help
if anyone’s interested, I use this You can add the shortcodes (specifically the rendered output) to the REST API with some custom code that I add as a plugin // https://scottbolinger.com/custom-post-types-wp-api-v2/ function sb_add_cpts_to_api( $args, $post_type ) { if(is_admin()) return $args; if ( "shortcode" === $post_type ) { $args["show_in_rest"] = true; } return $args; } add_filter( "register_post_type_args", "sb_add_cpts_to_api", 10, 2 ); I like CCS because you can do al…

Read full topic

item.title: Using shortcodes in Frontity
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @mh123 ,

Shortcodes in WordPress are just quick ways of generating HTML The result of the shortcodes is included in the rendered content available for posts via the REST API

Regarding Contact Form there are some updates pending to be done in the package (not maintained by the Frontity team) so that may lead to some issues. Have a look at the following post to learn more about this

Contact Form 7 Throws Error on Submit 🙋Get Help
Hi again @mh123 , After another review, I’ve realized that the contact form 7 package from NPM doesn’t work with the latest version of the contact form 7 plugin. So, you should either get the package from Github, or use an earlier version of the plugin. Check this post for more info about this

Hope this helps

Read full topic

item.title: Using shortcodes in Frontity
item.dc:creator: mh123
item.description:
Is there any additional configuration for shortcodes? My contact form is not showing up (added short code on Contact page)

Read full topic
